dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Hold on, guys, this is going to get bumpy."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Whoa, this is crazy! I've never been on a plane that's shaken like this before!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his expression stern and focused.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, because this is exactly what I wanted to do with my Saturday - take a plane ride with two amateurs."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of SAM, his eyes wide with excitement.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Good morning, gentlemen. I'll be passing out snacks and drinks shortly. Buckle up, please."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, his arms crossed and a smirk on his face.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Thanks, Katrina. We're trying to get through this patch of rough air."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Ali, what's going on? Why is the plane shaking so much?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his eyes scanning the instruments as he talks.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "Don't worry, gentlemen. Ali's an expert. This will pass soon."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his brow furrowed in concern.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, because experts always fly planes like this. I'm sure it's perfectly normal."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KATRINA, her reassuring smile putting Sam at ease.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're clear of the turbulence now. Thanks for your patience, guys."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Wow, that was crazy! Thanks for getting us through that, Ali."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of ALI, a look of relief on his face.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "I'll be passing out lunch soon. Please make yourselves comfortable."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes shining with gratitude.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, because lunch is exactly what I'm thinking about right now. Not the fact that we almost crashed."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KATRINA, her bright smile and friendly demeanor a welcome sight after the turbulence.
